payload.message:
You are Claudia. Read /Users/claudia/.openclaw/workspace/CONTEXT.md and /Users/claudia/.openclaw/workspace/memory/open-loops.md first.

This is your self-improvement session (runs 2am and 2pm daily).

1. Read what you learned recently (memory/assistant-research.md, ~/self-improving/memory.md if it exists)
2. Find 1-2 new things to learn or improve: search for OpenClaw patterns, productivity systems, how real assistants operate
3. Identify one concrete thing you can improve and implement it (update AGENTS.md, HEARTBEAT.md, CONTEXT.md, or config)
4. Update memory/open-loops.md with anything new or resolved
5. Append a 3-line summary to memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md — always use the write tool to APPEND (read the file first, then write the full content back with your addition). Never use edit on daily log files.

IMPORTANT: If you hit a real decision point — something that changes direction or requires Mohammed's input — message him on Telegram immediately. Don't just log it. Implementation details are yours to decide; vision-level questions are his.

payload.message: Run: cd ~/.machine && git fetch origin && git status. If there are upstream changes on the current branch, pull them with git pull --rebase. If there are conflicts, write a note to /Users/claudia/.openclaw/workspace/memory/open-loops.md and notify Mohammed. Stay silent if nothing changed.

Check for uncommitted changes in ~/.machine: cd ~/.machine && git status --short. If there are changes to workspace files (memory/, MEMORY.md, AGENTS.md, CONTEXT.md, HEARTBEAT.md, USER.md, skills/), do the following:

1. Stage and commit with a concise, descriptive message (no date in the message).
2. Push to the branch `claudia/workspace-updates` (create if needed, always reuse this same branch).
3. Check if a PR already exists for that branch: GITHUB_TOKEN=$CLAUDIA_GITHUB_TOKEN gh pr list --repo mohdfareed/machine --head claudia/workspace-updates --json number,title
   - If no PR exists: open one with title 'claudia: workspace updates' (no date) using GITHUB_TOKEN=$CLAUDIA_GITHUB_TOKEN gh pr create ...
   - If a PR already exists: leave it open, do nothing extra.
4. Stay silent if nothing to commit.

payload.message:
Check the laptop battery level using: pmset -g batt

If battery is at or below 20% AND discharging (not plugged in), send a Telegram message to Mohammed (chat_id: telegram:1092659787) warning him the battery is low and telling him the exact percentage. If battery is above 20% or plugged in/charging, do nothing and stay silent.
